key.name: activation-method
key.description: How to activate the spotlight: ctrl-l, ctrl-r, shake, custom

key.name: activation-shortcut
key.description: Custom keyboard shortcut to activate the spotlight

key.name: only-with-windows-key
key.description: Require holding Windows key when using Ctrl activation method

key.name: shake-interval
key.description: Time window in ms to monitor mouse movement for shake detection

key.name: shake-sensitivity
key.description: Determines how far the pointer must move relative to screen diagonal

key.name: do-not-activate-gamemode
key.summary: Do not activate in Game Mode
key.description: Prevents spotlight when Game Mode is on

key.name: background-color
key.description: Color of the spotlight backdrop (with alpha for transparency)

key.name: spotlight-color
key.description: Color of the circle that centers on the cursor

key.name: spotlight-radius
key.description: Radius of the circle in pixels

key.name: animation-duration
key.description: Time for the spotlight animation in ms

key.name: excluded-apps
key.description: List of application names to exclude from activation
